name: workflow-assert
description: Assert conditions on the input payload. Fails the node (and the execution) if any assertion is violated. Useful for integration testing and contract validation.

ASSERTIONS.description: JSON array of assertion objects. Each object must have: path (dot-notation field path), op (eq|ne|gt|lt|contains|exists|not_exists), and optionally value. Example: [{"path":"status","op":"eq","value":"ok"},{"path":"count","op":"gt","value":0}]

FAIL_FAST.description: When true, stop on first failed assertion. When false, collect all failures.
